title: Torrent
writer: Vicente Blasco Ibáñez, Dorothy Farnum, Katherine Hilliker
actors: Ricardo Cortez, Greta Garbo, Gertrude Olmstead
plot: A young girl and her father are kicked out of their house by a cruel noblewoman, and the girl's heart is broken when her sweetheart, the noblewoman's son, won't go to Paris with them. After becoming an opera star in Paris, the gir...
